macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Dips 0.81% in 24 Hours but Remains in Uptrend with $2.53T Capitalization
items.summary: The total cryptocurrency market capitalization stands at $2.53T, down 0.81% over the past 24 hours but up 5% weekly. Bitcoin trades just below $75K after retreating from $78K highs, with top performers SUSHI (+2.5%), IOTA (+2%), NEAR (+2%), and underperformers ZEC (−4.1%), ALGO (−2.5%), ETH (−0.4%).

items.title: Nearly $1B in Bitcoin ETF Inflows Signal Strong Institutional Interest
items.summary: Net inflows into spot Bitcoin ETFs reached $996.4 million last week, including $663 million on Friday—the highest since January 15—while US spot Ethereum ETFs saw $275.8 million weekly inflows. Bitcoin holds steady above $75,000 after Friday's highs over $78,000.

items.title: KelpDAO Hack Causes Collateral Damage to Aave, AAVE Token Drops 1% to $90
items.summary: DeFi platform Aave's AAVE token fell 1% to $90 amid fallout from the KelpDAO weekend hack. Major tokens like ETH, XRP, and SOL held steady over the past 24 hours despite the incident.

items.title: $7.9B Bitcoin Options Expiry on Deribit Looms Friday, Key Levels at $75K and $62K
items.summary: Roughly $7.9 billion in Bitcoin options expire on Deribit this Friday, April 24, with $395M call open interest at $75,000 and $330M put interest at $62,000. Bitcoin currently trades at $75,348, sitting at a critical juncture.

items.title: Bitcoin Mining Profitability Surges as Difficulty Drops 2.43%
items.summary: Bitcoin mining difficulty decreased 2.43% on April 17, driving hashprice above $36 per PH/s—the highest since January 31. Network hash rate recovered to ~992 EH/s from ~978 EH/s.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic Releases Mythos AI Model in Limited Gated Program Amid Cybersecurity Concerns
items.summary: Anthropic has launched Mythos, a powerful new AI model, through Project Glass Wing, restricting access to major organizations like AWS, Google, and JP Morgan Chase due to its ability to exploit weak security systems, as demonstrated by UK researchers. Finance leaders warn it could threaten banking infrastructure, prompting discussions in Canada and the White House.

items.title: Anthropic Withholds Public Release of Mythos Over Cybersecurity Risks
items.summary: Anthropic decided against publicly releasing Mythos after assessing its cybersecurity capabilities, instead providing gated access to defenders including Microsoft, Nvidia, and Crowdstrike to address vulnerabilities before wider deployment.

items.title: Humanoid Robot Breaks Human Record in Beijing Half Marathon
items.summary: Autonomous humanoid robots in Beijing beat a human record in a half marathon, highlighting China's rapid progress in robotics and AI technology.

items.title: Gen Z Expresses Growing Anger and Fears Over AI Job Displacement
items.summary: Gen Z influencers report a shift from excitement to anger toward AI, citing concerns about job losses and inadequate college preparation for the AI era.

items.title: Pentagon Advances AI for Warfare with Project Maven
items.summary: The U.S. Defense Department expands Project Maven, using AI to analyze drone footage, identify targets, and accelerate battlefield decisions for more efficient warfare.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Multiple Unannounced Nintendo Switch 2 Games Rated and Leaked Online
items.summary: Several unannounced Nintendo Switch 2 titles have appeared online through ratings, with more mystery games from another company surfacing recently. This continues a trend of leaks over the past weeks, building anticipation for the console.

items.title: Valve Hints at Steam Machine Update and New Steam Controller
items.summary: Documents suggest Valve is planning a Steam Machine revival and a new Steam controller, with Brad Lynch confirming receipt of large quantities of video cards. This could signal major hardware developments from the company.

items.title: Pragmata Launches to Critical Acclaim on Steam
items.summary: Pragmata released last Friday, earning a 97% 'Overwhelmingly Positive' rating on Steam and an 86 Metascore from 96 reviews. The game has been praised after extensive playtesting.

items.title: Crimson Desert Receives Massive Content Update and Sales Milestone
items.summary: Pearl Abyss announced a huge new content patch for Crimson Desert, alongside reaching 5 million units sold and nearly 100k concurrent players. The update promises significant changes and expansions.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Blue Origin Reuses New Glenn Booster for First Time but Misplaces Satellite in Orbit
items.summary: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn rocket's first-stage booster named 'Never Tell Me The Odds' during its third launch on April 19 from Cape Canaveral, but the second stage placed AST SpaceMobile’s BlueBird 7 satellite into a lower-than-planned orbit, making it unusable.

items.title: Quantum Computing Milestone: Fermionic Atom Gates Reach 99% Accuracy
items.summary: Two independent research teams achieved a breakthrough in quantum computing by demonstrating collisional quantum gates using fermionic atoms with over 99% accuracy, marking a long-sought milestone for logic operations via direct physical overlap.

items.title: Samsung Teases Project Luna AI Robot Concept
items.summary: Samsung revealed Project Luna, a new round-screen AI robot assistant with a swiveling head, showcased through a short video highlighting the company's hardware ambitions.

items.title: Six New Isolated Millisecond Pulsars Discovered by China's FAST Telescope
items.summary: Astronomers using the Five-hundred-meter Aperture Spherical radio Telescope (FAST) discovered six new isolated millisecond pulsars in galactic globular clusters NGC 6517 and NGC 7078.

items.title: Snap Lays Off 16% of Full-Time Staff Amid AI Embrace
items.summary: Snap announced layoffs affecting 16% of its full-time employees as the company shifts focus toward AI integration.

items.title: Netflix Cofounder Reed Hastings Steps Down from Company
items.summary: Billionaire Netflix cofounder Reed Hastings is leaving the company after years of leadership.

items.title: Roblox Settles with Nevada for $12 Million
items.summary: Roblox agreed to a $12 million settlement with Nevada, addressing unspecified issues in the gaming platform.
